title: RECTGTN Planning Domain Definition
description: JSON-LD schema for defining planning domains using the glTF Interactivity node standard library. Maps directly to IPyHOP RECTGTN elements: Replan, Execute (actions/commands), Check (goal verification), Tasks, Goals (unigoals), Nodes (multigoals).

@context.description: JSON-LD context mapping prefixes to IRIs.

types.description: KHR_interactivity type signatures used by this domain.

enums.description: Named enum mappings from string labels to integer values. Used to encode domain concepts (locations, statuses, etc.) as KHR_interactivity int variables.

variables.description: State variables. Each is a dict-of-dict in IPyHOP: state.<name>[<key>] = value. Maps to KHR_interactivity variable/get and variable/set nodes.

actions.description: RECTGTN 'E' — commands that can fail. Each action body is a sequence of check/set steps using KHR_interactivity node vocabulary. Returning None (check failure) triggers planner backtracking.

methods.description: RECTGTN 'T' — task methods with alternatives. The planner tries each alternative in order, backtracking on failure.

goals.description: RECTGTN 'G' — unigoal methods. A unigoal (var_name, arg, desired_val) is verified after execution (RECTGTN 'C'). Keys are state variable names.

multigoals.description: RECTGTN 'N' — multigoal methods. A multigoal is a conjunction of unigoals, decomposed one at a time, verified after each.

tasks.description: Initial task list. Each element is either a task tuple [name, arg1, ...] or a multigoal object {"multigoal": {var: {key: desired, ...}}}.

oneOf.description: Task or action invocation: [name, arg1, arg2, ...].

name.description: Variable name. Becomes state.<name> in IPyHOP.

init.description: Initial values: {key: value, ...}. Becomes state.<name>[key] = value.

bindStep.description: Maps to KHR_interactivity variable/get node. Reads state.<from[0]>[from[1]] at plan/execution time and binds it to a named variable for use in body steps or subtasks.

name.description: Name to bind the value to. Referenced as {name} in body/subtasks.

from.description: [variable_name, key]. Key may be a {param} reference.

action.description: A command (RECTGTN 'E'). Body steps map to KHR_interactivity nodes: 'bind' = variable/get, 'check' = variable/get + math/ieq (returns None on mismatch), 'set' = variable/set.

params.description: Parameter names. Referenced in body as {param_name}.

bind.description: variable/get steps executed before the body. Reads state and binds values for use in check/set steps.

body.description: Sequence of check/set steps executed in order.

bodyStep.description: A single check or set step. Maps to KHR_interactivity nodes.

oneOf.description: Check step: variable/get + comparison + flow/branch(false→fail). Supports all KHR_interactivity comparison ops. Use exactly one comparison key: eq|lt|le|gt|ge|neq.

valueExpr.description: A value expression. Covers the KHR_interactivity math std lib. Integer ops (iadd, isub, ...) use floor division and int results. Float ops (add, sub, ...) use true division.

anyOf.description: Math expression. Maps to KHR_interactivity math nodes.

key.description: Key (for op='get'). May be a {param} reference.

methodGroup.description: A set of alternative methods for a task or goal. The planner tries each alternative in order, backtracking on failure.

alternative.description: One method alternative. If check fails, planner skips to next alternative.

bind.description: variable/get steps. Reads state before checking preconditions or generating subtasks.

check.description: Preconditions on this alternative. Same format as action check steps. If any fails, alternative returns None and planner tries next.

subtasks.description: Decomposition: list of [action_or_task, arg1, ...] tuples. Empty = task already achieved.

multigoalDef.description: Multigoal definition (RECTGTN 'N'). Decomposed into unigoals one at a time.

goal_tag.description: Tag for matching multigoal methods. null matches the default method.
